response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with broad polyglot experience but lacks the core requirements for this role: no demonstrated embedded firmware or LAN-switch development, no recent professional C/UNIX systems work (only a brief National Instruments stint over a decade ago), no Linux kernel modification experience, no security-protocol work (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), and critically no Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across diverse stacks
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and bachelor thesis (Linux, C++, audio systems)
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing culture
concerns: No embedded firmware, switch chip, or Linux kernel modification experience
No demonstrated work on security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection) or L2/L3 networking internals
